robomaker.simulationapplicationversion.C: The `AWS::RoboMaker::SimulationApplicationVersion` resource creates a version of an AWS RoboMaker simulation application.

robomaker.simulationapplicationversion.A.Description: The application information for the simulation application.

robomaker.simulationapplicationversion.C.Description: The current revision id for the simulation application. If you provide a value and it matches the latest revision ID, a new version will be created.
